title: Time, work & payslips
subtitle: Timings, wages, invoices, deductions and workplace calculations.
curriculumLinks: Module 4: income, expenditure, wages, holidays and contracts
MCS.2: convert between units of time
examContexts: total build time in hours and minutes
gross tax, tax credit, deductions and net pay

rules.title: Convert minutes to hours and minutes
rules.explanation: There are 60 minutes in 1 hour. Divide by 60 to find hours, and the remainder is the minutes left over.
steps: The whole number is hours and the remainder is minutes.

examples.question: Change 175 minutes to hours and minutes.

rules.title: Invoices are item totals added together
rules.explanation: Multiply quantity by price for each line, then add all lines for the final total.
rules.formula: invoice total = item 1 + item 2 + labour + charges
steps: Check the final answer is in EUR.

examples.question: Two rolls cost EUR 75 each and labour is 5 hours at EUR 50.

rules.title: Net pay is what is left
rules.explanation: Gross pay is before deductions. Net pay is gross pay minus tax, PRSI, USC and any other deductions.
rules.formula: net pay = gross pay - total deductions
steps: Subtract tax credits to get net tax.
Add all deductions and subtract them from gross pay.

examples.question: Gross pay is EUR 420. Deductions are EUR 60.

rules.title: Weeks and months are approximate
rules.explanation: Some exam questions use 4.3 weeks in a month. Divide weeks by 4.3 to change weeks into months.
steps: Round as asked in the question.

examples.question: Change 44 weeks into months using 4.3 weeks per month.
examples.answer: 10 months to the nearest whole month
